note: DEMO/SAMPLE/SIMULATION evidence notes only. Fictional analyst notes, not real reporting.

evidence_notes.title: Demo need: starting PG
evidence_notes.summary: Simulation note: team lacks a true starting PG; roster analysis flags PG as top need.

evidence_notes.title: Demo need: bench scoring
evidence_notes.summary: Simulation note: second unit lacks scoring punch; bench SG candidate identified.

evidence_notes.title: Demo cap space check
evidence_notes.summary: Simulation note: team has roughly 12M in cap space, enough for a mid-level PG deal.

evidence_notes.title: Demo fit: 3-and-D wing
evidence_notes.summary: Simulation note: target wing fits need for spacing and perimeter defense.

evidence_notes.title: Demo risk: second apron
evidence_notes.summary: Simulation note: aggressive signing would push team close to second apron; caution advised.

evidence_notes.title: Demo team context: ATL retool window
evidence_notes.summary: Simulation note: ATL is in a retool window around its core; front office prefers short-term deals.

evidence_notes.title: Demo market: center market thin
evidence_notes.summary: Simulation note: the demo free-agent center market is thin; only one starter-caliber C available.

evidence_notes.title: Demo transaction: minimum signing fits cap
evidence_notes.summary: Simulation note: a minimum-salary signing for a backup PG fits cleanly under the cap without apron risk.
